info.name: 🔧 ALdeci — REMEDIATE
info.description:
## Remediate — "How do I fix it?"

Covers: Remediation Center, AutoFix, Bulk Operations, Collaboration, Workflows, Tickets

### Personas Served
- **Alex Rivera** (Security Engineer) — autofix, remediation tasks
- **Mike Chen** (Developer) — apply fixes, validate, create PRs
- **Raj Patel** (DevSecOps Lead) — bulk ops, workflow automation
- **Sarah Chen** (CISO) — SLA tracking, remediation metrics
- **Tom Baker** (External Auditor) — remediation evidence

### Endpoints: 100+ covering remediation, autofix, bulk, collaboration, workflows, copilot

### Vision Pillars: V3 (Decision Intelligence), V8 (Self-Learning), V10 (CTEM)

item.name: 🔧 Remediation Center
item.description: Core remediation task management — create, assign, track, SLA.

body.raw:
{
  "finding_id": "{{findingId}}",
  "title": "Fix SQL Injection in payment-service",
  "severity": "critical",
  "assignee": "alex.rivera@company.com",
  "sla_hours": 24,
  "description": "Remediate SQL injection vulnerability in login endpoint",
  "priority": "P0",
  "cluster_id": "cluster-001",
  "org_id": "{{orgId}}",
  "app_id": "test-app-001"
}

exec: var items = body.tasks || body.items || body.data || body.workflows ||
var id = items[0].task_id || items[0].id || items[0].task_id || items[0].fix_id;

item.description: Enterprise-scale batch operations on findings and clusters.

item.name: 💬 Collaboration Hub
item.description: Cross-team collaboration — comments, watchers, activities, notifications.

body.raw:

  ],

}
